AI Infrastructure Tools

LLM Developer Tools

FastMCP 3.0 is a framework for building smarter AI context apps, not just tool servers. Pull tools and data from anywhere, reshape them, control access, track state, and run long tasks — with hot reload, versioning, and observability built in for production use.

# FastMCP 3.0 Reviews

### The community submitted 4 reviews to tell us what they like about FastMCP 3.0, what FastMCP 3.0 can do better, and more.

5.0

Based on 4 reviews [...] •3 reviews

We chose FastMCP because it treats MCP servers like FastAPI applications. Decorator-based DX: Instead of writing verbose class-based boilerplate, we just use @mcp.tool(). It feels exactly like writing a FastAPI route. Pydantic Native: Since we heavily use Pydantic for data validation (SERP results, GSC data), FastMCP's native integration saved us hours of conversion work. Built-in Image Support: FastMCP makes it incredibly easy to return multimodal responses (images + text), which is crucial for our "Site Health Check" features that visualize data. SSE out-of-the-box: Connecting to Claude Desktop requires a robust Server-Sent Events implementation. FastMCP handles the handshake, keep-alive, and transport details automatically. It's the "FastAPI moment" for the MCP ecosystem. [...] #### Alternatives Considered

MCP360p/mcp360Rohit Joshi•

8mo ago

### We're launching MCP360 today! 🚀

Excited to announce that MCP360 is officially live today!

MCP360 is the App Store for AI agents giving you instant access to 100+ tools via one MCP Platform. Whether you're building AI applications or looking to boost productivity, MCP360 makes complex integrations easy for everyone.

We'd love for you to try it out for free and share your feedback with us. Your insights will help us make MCP360 even better!

Let us know what you think!

View all

Based on 7 reviews

Review MCP360?

#### What's great [...] Most Informative

•1 review

#### What's great

Just tried out MCP360 — super cool idea! It’s basically an App Store for AI agents, giving you access to a bunch of tools all in one place. Really easy to use and great for anyone working with AI or just wanting to boost productivity. Excited to see how it grows and what new tools get added!

#### What needs improvement

All good

#### vs Alternatives

I chose MCP360 because it brings everything together in one place — instead of juggling tons of APIs and tools, I can access them all through a single platform. It’s super easy to set up, works well with existing AI workflows, and helps boost productivity right away. Plus, the free plan made it easy to try out before committing.

Ratings

Ease of use

Reliability

Value for money

results.content:
André J
DiffSense

DiffSense

Very good overview! Altho these limits change all the time 😅. And no one really knows for sure how they work. So your always at risk of going to linkedin jail or being shaddow limited. I think thats the core pain with LI automation. Constant worry that your gonna get marked for llife. Like LI accounts, you can only have one. thats it. Im not sure if it can be solved. Maybe with some trickle strategy spread out of time. Or something. I dont know. Or maybe add a "super safe mode" option / checkbox. Just a checkbox of some kind? that would make me confident in using LI automation I think. one question.The way you use browser. i presume its in the MCP client it self, so my IP shows up in linkedin? or does it start chrome or is it remote browser?
